query:
SELECT wuxing, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rarity='common' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as common_cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rarity='rare' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rare_cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rarity='elite' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as elite_cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rarity='epic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as epic_cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rarity='legendary' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as legendary_cnt
FROM game_monster_catalog WHERE is_active = 1
GROUP BY wuxing ORDER BY total DESC;

  SUM(CASE WHEN rarity='rare' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rare_cnt,

  SUM(CASE WHEN rarity='epic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as epic_cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rarity='legendary' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as legendary_cnt
